title: oenothera quadrivulnera var. dasycarpa
intro: Oenothera quadrivulnera var. dasycarpa, also known as the four-angled evening primrose, is a plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera quadrivulnera var. dasycarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support skin health. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and oils, which can be used to make topical creams and salves for skin issues and wounds.
